message:
test(fcp-core,fcp-sdk): expand secret, posture, and runtime tests

secret: +54 tests (69→123) covering SecretId parsing, SecretType/Format
edge cases, SecretObject usability boundaries, SecretAccessToken lifecycle,
SecretMaterial debug redaction, ThresholdSecretObject rotation.
posture: +48 tests (70→118) covering PostureAttributeValue accessors,
PostureAttestation edge cases, PostureRequirement type mismatches,
version_gte edge cases, composite requirements.
runtime: +49 tests (134→183) covering SupervisorConfig backoff/validate,
HealthTracker evaluate/snapshot, CursorStore commits/leases,
streaming/polling supervisor accessors, HealthTransition variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
